calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-17-2009 Continued To Aug-07-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-23-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Roberto Jimenez, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff: Sara Kwong, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Genesis Interactive Inc. as follows:
Damages $26,589.52
Attorney's Fees $3,750.00
Costs $365.00, for a total of $30,704.52
Judgment signed in open court.
